notes: Every page that carries the inline funnel must (a) contain the four DROZQ_FUNNEL markers in the same order as /index.html, (b) appear in `pages` above as a path relative to the repo root. Run `python scripts/sync_funnels.py` to propagate the funnel from index.html to every registered page. Source of truth is `source`; never hand-edit a synced page's funnel block.
